title: THE HIDDEN GLOBAL (Discounted)
description: This Project Adds Entitys Like Null
body:
__**Read Please!**__

This Mod Is Gonna Be Lost!
New Version In[curseforge.com](https://old.curseforge.com/)

This Mod Has A Lot Of Loud Noises And Can Ban You So Please Stay Safe

[![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/Visit-My%20YouTube-red?style=for-the-badge&logo=youtube)](https://www.youtube.com/@LicoLeafy)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

What Does Adds This Mod?:

This Mod Adds Scary Things Like Entitys Ban Kicks And More

Why Would A User Want To Download It?:

Because Its Scary!

When I Open Minecraft This Mod Crashes?:

If You Using Some Mods It Can Crash So I Recommend Using Without Some Mods

I Have Problem I Cant Get Unbanned?:

We Trying To Fix It And I Think Set FPS To 10 / 20 To Get Unbanned But One Entity Can Kick Us

What Features Does It Have?:

This Mod Addes Features Like Baning Or Kick Players So Pls Stay Safe When You See Entitys

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**✅ Features:**
1. Baning Players
2. Kicking Players
3. Events Like Showing Text RUN!
4. Entitys Chase Players

Please Use Texture Pack:
[Nostalgic Texture Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days)
